item.title: Economics of Uncertainty and Information
item.description: Graduate course materials for Economics of Uncertainty and Information.

item.title: Foundations of Mathematical Economics
item.description: Course information for ECO1162: Foundations of Mathematical Economics.

item.title: Research
item.description: Publications Fooling or Pooling: An Experiment on Signaling with F. Feri, M. A. Meléndez-Jiménez, G. Ponti, F. Vega-Redondo, Journal of Economic Behavior & Organization 176 (2020): 582-596. Cognitive (Ir)reflection: New Experimental Evidence with C. Cueva, E. Mata-Pérez, I. Iturbe-Ormaetxe, G. Ponti, M. Sartarelli, and V. Zhukova, Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics 64 (2016): 81-93. Working Papers Imperfect Monitoring and Conflicts: Evidence from an Ultimatum Game (Submitted) Weaponized Reputation: Experimental Evidence on the Misuse of Coordinated Punishments (Submitted) Information Disclosure and Strategic Conservation in the Commons: An Experimental Investigation Property Rights as Outside Options: An Experimental Test Common Knowledge of Rationality and Information Demand: An Experiment on Observational Learning and Information Consumption Work in Progress The Strategic Value of Organizational Inefficiency: An Experimental Study Leapfrogging the Coase Conjecture
